樓主會唔會考慮下我

My friend ed has also broken up with his girlfriend so he's a bit down. He studied higher diploma in Australia but besides IT he failed all the exams and failed them again in his resktsdo the government refused to grant him a student visa again. His great grandfather was granted asylum by the japanese government during the cold war. His cousins tom and Jerry have been accused of robbery. If convicted they would be thrown in jail for two years for it. The judge granted bail to Tom but refused to grant Jerry bail. Tom's parents have agreed to stand bail for tom who's now remanded on bail of five hundred thousand dollars whereas Jerry is remanded in custody for two weeks. His best friend judy is coming to hong kong so he'll have her over for a few nights. I said "having him around for a few nights is fair enough but you should let your family know before having her over." My brother too said "I grant that it's very kind of you to have her over but you should let your family know beforehand."

replies.msg:
你好，這是《自殺．自療．互助舍》。看來你已累積了不少負面情緒，是嗎？人就好像氣球一樣，若積存的鬱結和壓力太多，便會有爆發的一天。何不暫時停一停，到我們的網站www.help4suicide.com.hk。 那裡有一些勵志故事和有趣短片，你可以隨心看看。你也可以進入網站內的『Chat窿』（星期一至五：上午六時至凌晨一時；星期六、日及公眾假期：下午８時至凌晨１時），讓我們的義工為你加油打氣！

我們願意聆聽你的心聲，伴你一起走過這段艱難的時候！只因『晴天雨天要樂天，難關難過總會過』！

《自殺．自療．互助舍》
